sizing_rule.note: Optimal f derived from cumulative probability distribution of historical trade returns fitted to normal distribution across ±3 sigma range using equations (4.06) and (4.12). Specific f value not numerically stated in excerpt; requires calculation from fitted parameters.

source_rule_text: Calculate optimal f using cumulative probability distribution parameters derived from historical trade data fitted to a normal distribution, where optimal f represents the fraction of capital to risk per trade for long-term wealth maximization.
